AI-powered video and podcast editor. Imp: AI-powered video and podcast editor. Import media, run AI edits with Underlord, and publish.
To create an API token:\n1. Open **Setti:
To create an API token:
1. Open **Settings** in Descript.
2. Select **API tokens** from the sidebar.
3. Click **Create token**, give it a name, select a Drive, and click **Create token**.
4. Copy the token and paste it here — you can only view it once.
Imports a media file from a URL into a n: Imports a media file from a URL into a new or existing Descript project and optionally creates a composition.
Use Descript's AI agent \"Underlord\" to: Use Descript's AI agent "Underlord" to edit an existing project or create a new one with a natural language prompt.
Publishes a composition from a project t: Publishes a composition from a project to create a shareable link and a downloadable export file.
Retrieves the current status of a Descri: Retrieves the current status of a Descript background job (import, agent edit, or publish). Use the job_id returned by any job-creation action.
Returns projects in your Descript Drive. Supports filtering by name, date, and creator.
Retrieves details for a Descript project: Retrieves details for a Descript project including its compositions and media files.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Create a new project or import into an e: Create a new project or import into an existing one.
Select the project to import media into.
Name for the new project. Only used when: Name for the new project. Only used when creating a new project.
Folder path for the new project (e.g. \": Folder path for the new project (e.g. "Clients/Acme"). Supports nested paths using "/". Missing folders are created automatically. Only applies when creating a new project.
Access level for Drive members on the ne: Access level for Drive members on the new project. Only applies when creating a new project.
Display name for the media file (e.g. \": Display name for the media file (e.g. "intro.mp4" or "Recordings/interview.mp4"). Use "/" to organize into sub-folders. Must not conflict with existing file names when importing into an existing project.
Public URL of the media file. Must be ac: Public URL of the media file. Must be accessible by Descript servers and support HTTP Range requests. Sign URLs for 12–48 hours if they expire.
ISO 639-1 language code for transcriptio: ISO 639-1 language code for transcription (e.g. "en", "es", "fr"). Leave blank to auto-detect from the audio.
Name for the composition (timeline) to c: Name for the composition (timeline) to create from the imported media. Leave blank to skip composition creation.
Width of the composition in pixels. Defa: Width of the composition in pixels. Defaults to 1920. Only used when a Composition Name is provided.
Height of the composition in pixels. Def: Height of the composition in pixels. Defaults to 1080. Only used when a Composition Name is provided.
Optional webhook URL. When the import fi: Optional webhook URL. When the import finishes or fails, Descript will POST the job status to this URL (same payload as Get Job Status).
Choose whether to edit an existing proje: Choose whether to edit an existing project or create a brand new one.
Select the project for the agent to edit: Select the project for the agent to edit.
Name for the new project (only used when: Name for the new project (only used when creating a new project).
Access level for team members on the new: Access level for team members on the new project. Only applies when creating a new project.
Select the composition (timeline) within: Select the composition (timeline) within the project. If omitted, the agent chooses automatically.
Natural language instruction for Underlo: Natural language instruction for Underlord. Examples: "Add studio sound to every clip", "Remove all filler words", "Create a 30-second highlight reel with the best moments". Be specific — frame edits as a single one-shot instruction.
AI model to use for editing. Leave blank: AI model to use for editing. Leave blank to use the Descript default.
Optional webhook URL. When the job finis: Optional webhook URL. When the job finishes or fails, Descript will POST the job status to this URL (same payload as Get Job Status).
Select the Descript project to use.
Choose whether to export the project as: Choose whether to export the project as a video or audio file.
Resolution for the exported video. Only: Resolution for the exported video. Only applies when Output Type is Video.
Who can view the published share page. L: Who can view the published share page. Leave blank to use your Drive's default. Note: requesting a level your Drive disallows (e.g. Public when search-engine indexing is off) will return an error.
Optional webhook URL. When the publish j: Optional webhook URL. When the publish job finishes or fails, Descript will POST the job status to this URL (same payload as Get Job Status). The result includes share_url and download_url once complete.
The job ID returned when you created the: The job ID returned when you created the job (e.g. from "Import Media", "Agent Edit", or "Publish Project" actions).
Return only projects whose name contains: Return only projects whose name contains this string (case-insensitive).
Return only projects created after this: Return only projects created after this date (ISO 8601, e.g. 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z).
Return only projects created before this: Return only projects created before this date (ISO 8601, e.g. 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z).
Return only projects updated after this: Return only projects updated after this date (ISO 8601, e.g. 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z).
Return only projects updated before this: Return only projects updated before this date (ISO 8601, e.g. 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z).
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
Name: Name
HEAD: HEAD
Triggers when a Descript background job: Triggers when a Descript background job (import, agent edit, or publish) finishes.
Only trigger for jobs of this type. Sele: Only trigger for jobs of this type. Select "All job types" to trigger for any completed job.
